dict.string: Cairn lists files inside your Music folder as part of browsing your home directory. It does not play, modify, or upload any media.
Cairn needs access to your Desktop to display and manage its files as a Finder replacement.
Cairn needs access to your Documents to display and manage its files as a Finder replacement.
Cairn needs access to your Downloads to display and manage its files as a Finder replacement.
Cairn lists and opens files on network volumes as a Finder replacement.
Cairn lists files inside your Pictures folder as part of browsing your home directory. It does not read photo contents or metadata.
Cairn lists and opens files on removable volumes as a Finder replacement.
